settings.heading: Spirit wear and booster club fundraisers built around your deadline.
settings.lead: Create a campaign for school groups, teams, churches and community organizations without managing every order manually.
settings.body:
L F Graphco helps fundraising groups turn apparel into a clear campaign with product choices, deadline planning and quote-ready order details. Fundraising programs can include custom t-shirts, hoodies, spirit wear and promotional items.

The goal is simple: make the campaign easy to promote, easy to order and easy to fulfill.
settings.features: Booster Clubs,School Spirit Wear,Church Groups,Campaign Deadlines,Team Apparel

settings.heading: Plan the apparel before the campaign starts.
settings.intro: A clear quote helps set goals, choose products and promote the fundraiser with confidence.

settings.heading: Fundraisers can use printing, embroidery, DTF and promo items.
settings.intro: Build a campaign around shirts, hoodies, caps, polos or giveaways that fit your audience and deadline.

settings.heading: Tell us your group, goal and deadline.
settings.intro: Send the project basics and L F Graphco will help you shape a quote-ready fundraising apparel plan.
